programs.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programs.desc: Follows the men and women of the US Coast guard at Air Station Kodiak  where they perform rescues  protect the environment  and oversee marine transportation safety.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: In Bristol, customs officer Ann catches three passengers with 87 kilos of tobacco worth thousands of pounds.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: A passenger caught at Bristol airport with too many cigarettes admits to having done it for years  the crew of fast cutter Searcher investigate mysterious pot-markers off the Cornish coast.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: At Gatwick, the customs team catch a cocaine smuggler and he confesses that he's being met by an accomplice, so the officers lay a trap to catch him too.
